title: Pathways from Contaminated Water to Human Disease
description: A flowchart illustrating how e-waste contamination leads to waterborne and water-induced diseases, highlighting the causal pathways and key elements.
relationships: Improper E-Waste Disposal leads to Leachate
Contaminated water enables Human Exposure Pathways (drinking, bathing, irrigation)
Exposure Pathways lead to Waterborne Diseases (ingestion of pathogens)
Exposure Pathways lead to Water-Induced Diseases (contact with contaminated water or toxic chemicals)
